frontmatter.title: My First Modular Design
frontmatter.summary: a slightly more simple approach to using samples.

content:
# Gathering and Organizing Samples for a New Workflow.

Designing a hardware module is always a journey. You start with a concept, but as soon as you hit the breadboard, things begin to mutate. The design for this module was no exception!

Here are some things I focused on:
- **Tone clarity** across the entire frequency range.
- **Ergonomics**, because a cramped panel is never fun to play.
- **Power efficiency**, ensuring it doesn't drag down the rest of the rack.

Below is an interactive look at the interface using the `ModuleExplorer` component! You can drop React components right into these markdown files!

*(Note: Add the `<ModuleExplorer />` here once you have the data ready!)*

Stay tuned for more updates on my process.
